feedback: The submission shows a solid understanding of structural design principles and clear implementation logic. However, the student could improve on optimization details and error handling routines. Overall performance is highly satisfactory.
weaknesses: Edge case validations for negative integers or overflow limits are missing in the main loop.
Minor code duplication identified in the grade comparison helper functions.
recommendations: Implement strict input guardrails to prevent potential runtime exceptions when dealing with out-of-bound inputs.
Refactor the grading helper logic to utilize a single unified mapping function, reducing complexity by ~15%.

criteria_breakdown.comments: Excellent architectural structure and solid base components.
Loop structures are clear, but nested boundaries can be minimized.
Missing critical edge-case exceptions for negative integer limits.
